title: The Prompt Engineering Fix That Stops AI From Making Things Up
description: AI hallucinations plague professional workflows, but custom prompt engineering techniques — including uncertainty flagging, honesty constraints, and confidence ratings — are proving remarkably effective at reducing fabricated outputs from large language models like GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini.

title: Fake missile strikes, White House memes and ‘useful idiots’: the AI war within the war
description: Former Secretary of State John Kerry once said the US had learned lessons of dignity and transparency from the failed Vietnam War. But the Trump Administration and Iran are playing by different rules.
